notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Riley Greene reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Raynel Delgado. Kevin McGonigle scores.

notableEvents.label: Riley Greene reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Riley Greene reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Raynel Delgado. Kevin McGonigle scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Meyers reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Colt Keith, assist to third baseman Kevin McGonigle. Jake Meyers to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Torkelson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Torkelson singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Brice Matthews.

notableEvents.label: Zach McKinstry GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry grounds into a double play, shortstop Jeremy Peña to first baseman Christian Walker. Spencer Torkelson out at 2nd. Zach McKinstry out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones walks. Ben Malgeri to 3rd. Kevin McGonigle to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Torkelson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Torkelson homers (13) on a fly ball to right center field. Riley Greene scores.

notableEvents.label: Ben Malgeri pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Yainer Diaz challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Ben Malgeri walks.
